features: Floor-grouped BOM export — assign sheets to named floors with multipliers; assembly rows are multiplied, panels/units/fire pads in a separate non-multiplied section
Unified Excel / CSV export modal — pick format and grouping (whole document / per sheet / by floor) in one place; sheet names and floor multipliers editable right in the modal
fixes: Layer card settings row no longer overflows when all four controls (Color, Shape, Opacity, Category) are visible
Removed duplicate Export annotated PDF button from Layers panel — use the Export menu instead
